Bash(node -e "const { DatabaseSync } = require\(''node:sqlite''\); const db = new DatabaseSync\(''./gazdetect.db''\); const files = db.prepare\(''SELECT id, original_name, upload_date FROM price_files ORDER BY upload_date DESC''\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(files, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const { DatabaseSync } = require\(''node:sqlite''\); const db = new DatabaseSync\(''./gazdetect.db''\); const counts = db.prepare\(''SELECT file_id, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM products GROUP BY file_id''\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(counts\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const { DatabaseSync } = require\(''node:sqlite''\); const db = new DatabaseSync\(''./gazdetect.db''\); const file = db.prepare\(''SELECT * FROM price_files WHERE id = 5''\).get\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(file\)\);")

Bash(sqlite3 backend/gazdetect.db "SELECT id, designation, reference, price_ht, extra_fields FROM products WHERE extra_fields LIKE ''%34%'' OR extra_fields LIKE ''%ref%'' OR extra_fields LIKE ''%Réf%'' LIMIT 5")

Bash(sqlite3 backend/gazdetect.db "SELECT id, designation, reference, price_ht, pa, extra_fields, sheet_name FROM products WHERE file_id IN \(SELECT id FROM price_files WHERE category LIKE ''%Bouteille%''\) LIMIT 5")
